stemHtml: How does a change in Pressure Altitude affect the climb performance with regard to the Rate Of Climb and the Climb Angle? Increasing Pressure Altitude results in...

options.a: a decreased Climb Angle but the Rate Of Climb remains the same.
options.b: an increased Rate Of Climb but the Climb Angle remains the same.
options.c: an increased Rate Of Climb and an increased Climb Angle.
options.d: a decreased Rate Of Climb and a decreased Climb Angle.
